languages.text: "Почему техножречество позволяет тебе работать вместе с ними? Разве аугменты не их вотчина?"
"Why do the Tech-Priests permit you to work alongside them? Augmetics are their preserve, are they not?"
languages.original_text: "Почему техножречество позволяет тебе работать вместе с ними? Разве аугменты не их вотчина?"

traits.locale_text: "Why do the Tech-Priests permit you to work alongside them? Augmetics are their preserve, are they not?"
"Why do the Tech-Priests permit you to work alongside them? Augmetics are their preserve, are they not?"
"Why do the Tech-Priests permit you to work alongside them? Augmetics are their preserve, are they not?"
"Why do the Tech-Priests permit you to work with augmetics? To my knowledge, one must be initiated into the mysteries of the Adeptus Mechanicus."
"Why do the Tech-Priests permit you to work with augmetics? To my knowledge, one must be initiated into the mysteries of the Adeptus Mechanicus."

languages.text: "Warum erlauben Euch die Techpriester, an ihrer Seite zu arbeiten? Sind Augmentationen nicht ihnen vorbehalten?"
languages.original_text: "Why do the Tech-Priests permit you to work alongside them? Augmetics are their preserve, are they not?"

traits.locale_text: "Warum erlauben Euch die Techpriester, an ihrer Seite zu arbeiten? Sind Augmentationen nicht ihnen vorbehalten?"

languages.text: « Pourquoi les technoprêtres vous autorisent-ils à travailler avec eux ? Les augmétiques sont censés être leur chasse gardée. »
languages.original_text: "Why do the Tech-Priests permit you to work alongside them? Augmetics are their preserve, are they not?"

traits.locale_text: « Pourquoi les technoprêtres vous autorisent-ils à travailler avec eux ? Les augmétiques sont censés être leur chasse gardée. »

languages.text: “技术神甫们怎么会允许你与他们一起工作？植入物改造不是由他们全权负责吗？”
languages.original_text: "Why do the Tech-Priests permit you to work alongside them? Augmetics are their preserve, are they not?"

traits.locale_text: “技术神甫们怎么会允许你与他们一起工作？植入物改造不是由他们全权负责吗？”

languages.text: «¿Por qué no le permiten los tecnosacerdotes trabajar con ellos? Los auméticos son parte de su especialidad, ¿no es así?».
languages.original_text: "Why do the Tech-Priests permit you to work alongside them? Augmetics are their preserve, are they not?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Por qué no le permiten los tecnosacerdotes trabajar con ellos? Los auméticos son parte de su especialidad, ¿no es así?».

languages.text: 「なぜ技術司祭たちは、君が彼らと並んで働くことを許しているのですか？オーグメティックは彼らの専権事項なのではないですか？」
languages.original_text: "Why do the Tech-Priests permit you to work alongside them? Augmetics are their preserve, are they not?"

traits.locale_text: 「なぜ技術司祭たちは、君が彼らと並んで働くことを許しているのですか？オーグメティックは彼らの専権事項なのではないですか？」

languages.text: "Tekno Rahipler neden onlarla birlikte çalışmana izin veriyor? Ogmetikler onların uzmanlık alanı değil mi?"
languages.original_text: "Why do the Tech-Priests permit you to work alongside them? Augmetics are their preserve, are they not?"

traits.locale_text: "Tekno Rahipler neden onlarla birlikte çalışmana izin veriyor? Ogmetikler onların uzmanlık alanı değil mi?"
